entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather that threatens economic well-being and ecology.

entities.name: DROUGHT MITIGATION
entities.description: Efforts to reduce the severity or impact of drought.

entities.name: DROUGHT PREPAREDNESS
entities.description: The state of being ready to deal with the impacts of drought, considered more effective than relief.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which established the Virtual Academy.

entities.name: VIRTUAL ACADEMY FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A group of activities established by ICRISAT to foster drought preparedness.

entities.name: OPEN EDUCATIONAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Reusable learning materials used to create content for rural learners.

entities.name: REUSABLE LEARNING OBJECTS
entities.description: The form that Open Educational Resources take for learning content creation.

entities.name: RURAL WOMEN
entities.description: The intended group of learners with limited classroom exposure.

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Individuals who consult learners as sources of expertise to solve production problems in drought situations.

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC INFORMATION SYSTEM
entities.description: Specially developed techniques used in the process of drought mitigation support.

relationships.target: VIRTUAL ACADEMY FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS

relationships.source: VIRTUAL ACADEMY FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS
